title: ixioliriaceae
intro: The ixioliriaceae rank is a family of flowering plants. It is a taxonomic rank that groups together plants that share similar characteristics and are more closely related to each other than to plants in other families. The ixioliriaceae family includes approximately 5 species of flowering plants, primarily found in the Mediterranean region. These plants are often characterized by their unique flower structures and growth habits, setting them apart from other plant families.
